reddit_draft.title: [Resource] Lightweight SF6 frame data site with JPG hitboxes (mobile-friendly)
reddit_draft.body:
I made a frame data site focused on fast mobile lookup:

- https://www.sf6maxdatabase.com
- All 30 characters
- Frame data + still JPG hitbox images (lighter than GIF)
- Built for low-spec phones

Not affiliated with Capcom. Data sourced from SuperCombo Wiki.
Feedback welcome if anything looks off.

checklist: Open https://x.com/i/flow/signup in a private browser (optional)
Use a NEW email (not main account) OR new Google account
Pick handle from suggestions (first available wins)
Paste display name + bio from x-account-setup.txt
Do NOT link this account to your main or diet account
Wait 24h before Day 2 post (avoid spam flags)
